    m = re.search(r'([0-9][0-9,]*)\s+forks', s, flags=re.I)

    m = re.search(r'forks\s+count\s+of\s+([0-9][0-9,]*)', s, flags=re.I)

        return int(m.group(1).replace(',',''))
    return None

}
